definitions.intraplate_domain: Canonical intraplate membership is defined at POINT LEVEL using dist_min_km = min(dist_gem_km, dist_pb_km) relative to GEM and PB2002 linework. Any ~1 km site collapse is auxiliary (robustness/visualization) and MUST NOT redefine membership.
definitions.outlier_definition: Outliers are computed at point level; 'kept intraplate' points are those with keep_intraplate=True after fragmentation QA (NO snapping).
definitions.pipeline_status: FROZEN — no further analytical changes permitted.
definitions.site_definition_auxiliary: Auxiliary ~1 km sites via EPSG:3857 grid rounding (1 km).

editorial_note: This manifest certifies that the analytical pipeline is closed. All manuscript-reported numbers must match the counts recorded here.
